properties.name: mybatis-plus.upsert.dynamic.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable dynamic datasource upsert auto-configuration

properties.name: mybatis-plus.upsert.dynamic.datasources
properties.description: Data source configurations for dynamic upsert. Key is data source name (must match spring.datasource.dynamic.datasource keys). Value contains db-type and use-new-mysql-syntax.

properties.name: mybatis-plus.upsert.dynamic.datasources.*.db-type
properties.description: Database type for this data source. Required: mysql | postgresql | oracle | sqlserver | h2 | custom

properties.name: mybatis-plus.upsert.dynamic.datasources.*.use-new-mysql-syntax
properties.description: Whether to use the new MySQL upsert syntax (AS new) for this data source. Only applicable for MySQL.
